seo.title: Our Outlets — Mall & Nurseries | Jal Agritech
seo.description: Visit Jal Agritech outlets — Jal Mall (Bhachau), Bholenath Nursery (Bhuj), Nandini Nursery (Adas, Aanand), and Garden Care (Ayodhya). Walk-in support for irrigation, landscaping, plants and supplies.
seo.keywords: outlets, jal mall bhachau, bholenath nursery bhuj, nandini nursery, garden care ayodhya, retail, dealer network

cards.title: Jal Mall — Bhachau
cards.description: Flagship retail mall stocking irrigation systems, plants, and complete project supplies.

cards.title: Bholenath Nursery — Bhuj
cards.description: Native species, ornamentals, and landscape-grade plants — adapted to Kutch's climate.

statistics.headline: Walk-In Support Across Bhuj, Gujarat & Beyond.
statistics.description: Four Jal Agritech outlets serve as full-service points for plant supply, irrigation parts, and on-site advice — backed by our pan-India operations team.

topics.title: Jal Mall — Bhachau
intro: Jal Mall in Bhachau is our flagship retail outlet — a single destination for irrigation systems, plants, garden supplies, and on-the-spot expert advice. Whether you are a farmer planning a drip installation or a landscape architect sourcing materials, Jal Mall stocks the full range under one roof.

topics.title: Bholenath Nursery — Bhuj
intro: Bholenath Nursery in Bhuj specializes in native species and ornamental plants suited to Kutch's arid climate. From Miyawaki-ready saplings to landscape-grade specimens, the nursery serves both retail walk-ins and large project orders.

topics.title: Nandini Nursery — Adas, Aanand
intro: Nandini Nursery in Adas (Aanand district) extends our reach into central Gujarat. The outlet focuses on ornamental varieties, climbing plants, and seasonal flowering species for residential landscaping projects.

topics.title: Garden Care — Ayodhya
intro: Garden Care in Ayodhya marks our Uttar Pradesh footprint — supplying plants, irrigation kits, and garden maintenance services to a market with growing demand for premium landscape work.
